author: Nan Liu
hardware_notes: 8xH100 SXM target unless record README says otherwise
exact_command:

records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-19_10L_MixedPrecision/train_gpt.py
notes: Exact current-session rerun used the record-local script snapshot and local dataset/tokenizer paths.

See the local run log for the concrete throughput and final metric lines on this host.
submission_blurb: 10-layer 512-dim model with lower LR (MATRIX_LR=0.02) and mixed int8/int6 compression: full int8 for first/last 3 layers, int6 (step=4 rounding) for middle layers 3-6. Fits 16MB via better compression while gaining an extra transformer layer over baseline.
claimed_method_summary: 10-layer 512-dim model with lower LR (MATRIX_LR=0.02) and mixed int8/int6 compression: full int8 for first/last 3 layers, int6 (step=4 rounding) for middle layers 3-6. Fits 16MB via better compression while gaining an extra transformer layer over baseline.
